results.rendered_html:
ṛśya or (in later texts) ṛṣya, as, m. the male of a species of antelope, the painted or white-footed antelope,  RV. viii, 4, 10 ;  AV. v, 14, 3 ;  VS. ;  AitBr. ;  Suśr.  &c.;
N. of a Ṛṣi,  ĀrṣBr. ;
of a son of Devātithi,  BhP. ;
(am), n. hurt, violation,  T.  (for the explanation of ṛśya-da);
[cf. riśya.]
